en.about.title: Eric Wang
en.about.desc: A multidisciplinary engineer exploring the intersection of machine learning, interactive design, and human-centric technology.
en.about.story.p1: I am a multidisciplinary engineer based in the digital ether. My work revolves around the intersection of machine learning and human-centric design. I believe that the most powerful tools are those that are both intelligent and intuitive.
en.about.story.p2: With a background in both Computer Science and Visual Arts, I approach technical problems with a creative lens. Whether it's optimizing a neural network or crafting a pixel-perfect interface, my goal is always excellence.
en.about.available: Available for freelance and full-time opportunities.

zh.about.title: Eric Wang
zh.about.desc: 一名探索机器学习、交互设计和以人为本技术交汇点的多学科工程师。
zh.about.story.p1: 我是一名驻扎在数字以太中的多学科工程师。我的工作围绕着机器学习和以人为本的设计展开。我相信最强大的工具是那些既智能又直观的工具。
zh.about.story.p2: 凭借计算机科学和视觉艺术的双重背景，我以创意视角审视技术问题。无论是优化神经网络还是打造像素级完美的界面，我的目标始终是卓越。
zh.about.available: 可承接自由职业和全职工作机会。
zh.home.hero.desc: 在机器学习与以人为本设计的交汇点。构建感觉像魔法一样的智能系统。
